# discord_sticker (Resource)

Manages a custom sticker within a Discord guild.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# file_data_uri is a write-only base64 data URI; load it from a local file.
data "discord_local_file" "sticker" {
  path = "sticker.png"
}

resource "discord_sticker" "example" {
  server_id     = "123456789012345678"
  name          = "wave"
  description   = "A friendly wave"
  tags          = "wave"
  file_data_uri = data.discord_local_file.sticker.data_uri
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Sticker description (may be empty).
- `file_data_uri` (String) Base64 data URI of the sticker file. Write-only: uploaded at creation and not refreshed from the API. The API cannot change the file after create.
- `name` (String) Sticker name.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild the sticker belongs to.
- `tags` (String) Autocomplete/suggestion tags for the sticker.

### Read-Only

- `available` (Boolean) Whether the sticker is available for use (may be false if the guild lost boosts).
- `format_type` (Number) Format of the sticker (`1` PNG, `2` APNG, `3` Lottie, `4` GIF).
- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the sticker.
